title: scoping issue of functions and with
poc: select * from tables) select * from foo;
key_bug_features: scoping issue of functions in SQL queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE baz (ref_id INT REFERENCES bar(id), description TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM baz) AS subquery WHERE ref_id IS NOT NULL;
